name: @myndhyve/wop-conformance
description: Black-box conformance test suite for WOP-compliant servers. FINAL v1.0 (suite at 1.8.0). 1.8.0 vendors api/openapi.yaml + api/asyncapi.yaml + schemas/*.schema.json into the published tarball so host implementers can consume contract material from one package (closes WOP-INTREE-DELETION-AUDIT.md M2). 1.7.0 added vendor-neutral redaction scenarios (NFR-7).
